name: Ryouhei Arisu
description: __Specialty:__ Psychological (Heart) The protagonist of Alice in Borderland. His alias is a reference to the main character "Alice" in Alice in Wonderland. A 3rd year high school student with the hidden potential to be one hell of an analyzer; he looks at things from afar and checks every detail he can find. He keeps track of everything he learns so that he can find a way to put an end to this twisted game.

name: Gash Bell
description: __Race:__ Mamodo __Spellbook Color:__ Red __Spellbook Power:__ Lightning Spells Gash is Kiyomaro's partner. He was discovered by Kiyomaro's father wounded and unconscious in a forest in England. Gash had no recollection of who he was or where he had come from. Gash is overly cheerful, possessing a strong sense of justice but he is clueless about most the world around him and often gets in trouble when not being supervised by someone. He is also initially unaware of the fact that he can shoot lig

name: Izuko Gaen
description: She is a young-looking woman who wears clothes that are too large for her. Izuko often boasts about her knowledge, coming off as somewhat arrogant. She claims to know everything, to the degree where she can predict the future; as a result, she likes to brag about this with her catchphrase, "There is nothing I don't know, I know everything." Izuko is also the younger sister of Tooe Gaen. When others get help from her, she wishes for something in return; usually ending up with them doing her a fav

name: Miria
description: __Name:__ Miria __Alias:__ Phantom Miria __Rank Number:__ No.6 of 78th Generation __Type:__ Offensive __Special attack:__ Phantom Mirage Miria is Claymore No. 6 of the 78th generation. Her great speed leaves after-images of herself in battle, confusing the opponent, thus earning herself the nickname, "Phantom Miria." She is also skilled at teamwork and tactics. Miria has long, pale blonde hair, styled in a razor-shag cut. She has silver eyes. After the Northern Campaign, she sometimes ties it in

name: Sanae Furukawa
description: **Height:** 158 cm (5' 2") Sanae is Nagisa's mother. Normally she's very childish and a cry-baby, but when needed she can be very strong-willed and dependable. She runs the Furukawa Bakery with her husband Akio. She often tries out strange concepts to make breads that are anything but edible and never get sold. Outside of the bakery, she tutors children. She's quite proud of the way people often mistake her for Nagisa's older sister because of her youthful appearance. ~!Sanae plays a larger role

name: Yuma Isogai
description: He is a student and class rep in class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School, taught by Korosensei.

name: Asako Natsume
description: __Height:__ 157 cm She was a classmate of Shizuku who one day asks for help in a re-test that she must not fail. She's revealed to be active on the web, where she has a blog, on which she even posted to need two strands of Mitti's hair to complete a ritual that'd assure them to become best friends. She's good at sports. She has poor grades, and does not have any friends outside of the internet. She was bullied and ostracized by her friends and classmates in the past, due to her popularity with t

name: Bruce Wayne
description: __Height__: 188 cm (6'2") Batman's secret identity is Bruce Wayne, a wealthy industrialist, playboy, and philanthropist. Witnessing the murder of his parents as a child leads him to train himself to physical and intellectual perfection and don a bat-themed costume in order to fight crime. Batman operates in the fictional Gotham City, assisted by various supporting characters including his sidekick Robin and his butler Alfred Pennyworth, and fights an assortment of villains influenced by the char

name: Geu Sonyeon
description: The boy who lost their parents live with one hope: that he can walk with the [girl](https://anilist.co/character/197692/Geu-Sonyeo) forever...until they come across adults who are trying to take that hope away.

name: Maria Ishida
description: Ishida's young niece who lives with Ishida and his family. Maria is half-Japanese from her mother's side and half-Brazilian from her father's side. ~!She gains a constant wonder about the difference between things that are dead and alive after Ishida's fall and fearing he might be dead, Yuzuru takes it upon herself to teach her the difference—being an expert on the matter.!~

name: Utsuro
description: Utsuro is the founder of the Tendoshu and was also the first leader of the Naraku Faction before Oboro. ~!It is later revealed in the Battle for Rakuyo Arc that Utsuro is actually Shouyou Yoshida, Gintoki's former teacher. After Shouyou was killed by Gintoki, the persona inside of Utsuro known as Shouyou died, allowing the Utsuro personality to take full control of the body.!~

name: Franky Franklin
nativeName: フランキー・フランクリン
description: __Height:__ 166 cm (5′5") __Affiliation:__ Ostania __Occupation:__ Tobacco Store Clerk (False Front), Informant, Soldier (formerly) Franky is an informant who seemingly works at a tobacco store and presumably works for Loid Forger's agency. He gets information regarding Eden Academy's exam and Anya Forger's past records for Loid Forger. Franky is a kind person willing to help Loid out when he's in a pinch even though the danger is high. description: Younger sister of [Jin-U](https://anilist.co/character/129928).

name: Joujirou Takajou
description: A first-year student and member of the student council. He can move at such high speeds that he looks like he's teleporting. However, he's not totally able to control where he stops, so he has to wear protective gear under his school uniform to prevent injury. ~!Takajou lets his ability be plundered by Yuu for his plan to succeed. He no longer possesses his ability.!~ (Source: Crunchyroll, edited)

name: Hacker
description: __Height:__ 160 cm __Weight:__ 47 kg __Estimated Prison Sentence:__ 589 years The Hacker is more excited the more difficult something is, but is completely apathetic to things he's uninterested in. He likes healthy jelly drinks.

name: Mary Macbeth
description: A mysterious girl who approached Leonardo Watch after he recovered from his injury. She is the younger sister of [Black](https://anilist.co/character/89131). She doesn't appear in the manga, and thus is an anime-only character. (Source: Kekkai Sensen Wiki)

name: Mei Raiden
description: __Height:__ 172 cm (5'8") Raiden Mei is one of the main protagonists along with Kiana Kaslana, Bronya Zaychik, Theresa Apocalypse and Murata Himeko. She is the daughter of the Massive Electric Industries' CEO. When she was young, her father was arrested for fraud and most of her family assets were seized due to her father’s criminal activities, and was later captured to be part of a Honkai-related experiment. This event has caused her to be cold and distant towards others, though her friendship

name: Pariston Hill
description: Pariston Hill is a Triple-Star Hunter and both the former 13th Chairman and 12th Vice Chairman of the Hunter Association. He is also a former member of the Zodiacs with the codename Rat. According to Ging Freecss, Pariston's personality is similar to Netero's and his own in that he likes to play around and enjoy himself, uninterested in winning or losing, which makes him very unpredictable. He always appears cheerful with a bright smile, making it quite impossible to read his thoughts and calcul

name: Riri
description: Riri is a wizard who can do romantic magic with their star shaped magic wand.

name: Seidou Takizawa
description: __Height:__ 171 cm Takizawa is a Rank 2 Ghoul Investigator. A classmate of [Akira Mado](https://anilist.co/character/88838/Akira-Mado) at the Academy, he is partnered with Kousuke Houji and assigned to the 20th ward to investigate the Gourmet. He greatly respects [Kishou Arima](https://anilist.co/character/88946/Kishou-Arima) and [Koutarou Amon](https://anilist.co/character/88407/Koutarou-Amon) and admires their achievements. ~!Though he was declared among the casualties of the raid in the 20th

name: Eiko Kawasegawa
description: Eiko is a competitive, stubborn, and mature young woman whose enthusiasm and talent for film-making have no bounds. She is also somewhat prickly and looks up to her older sister and professor Misaki Kanou. At the same time, she is able to empathize with others and holds herself to the same high standards she expects of her colleagues. ~!Later it is revealed that she also had romantic feelings towards Kyouya.!~

name: Hatz
description: __Species:__ Human __Height:__ 167cm __Position:__ Scout Hatsu (하츠, Hahcheu; or "Hatz") is a Regular and a "devoutly" practising swordsman. He is a quiet and calm warrior, who has been making good progress in the tests merely by doing exactly what each test entails. ~!He teamed up with [Anaak Jahad](https://anilist.co/character/135470/Anaak-Jahad) and [Shibisu](https://anilist.co/character/137957/Shibisu) during the first test on the 2nd Floor and later signed Khun's friend list.!~ ~!He was last

name: Scáthach
description: Scáthach, meaning "shadow" in Irish, is the queen and gatekeeper of the Land of Shadows. She is talented with both the spear and rune magecraft. She has capably taught many disciples, including Cú Chulainn, and is often called Shishou (master). A magic red spear is her weapon of choice. Scáthach has become half divine and as such is no longer able to die normally, which is something she laments. She has a regal attitude and tries to remain aloof of current events.

name: Ako Suminoe
description: __Height:__ 145 cm (OVA 7) Ako is the elder twin sister. A way to tell her apart from Riko is that she wears a hair clip to keep the hair off her forehead. She has a reliable, level-headed personality, but can be sullen, moody, even a bit childish and is quickly embarrassed.
